{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201757441F25724BF4D0C8B0080D"}"},"total":418},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7580951031581999934","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"养了一段时间，果然不出我所料，评分低，前期真的很好看，但从七十多章开始，我就感觉味道变了。只能说太让我失望了"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765080548,"group_id":"7539186050049002558","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1750843172332523"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539186050049002558","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"82"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"6","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3746,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7555709799218430782","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"毫不夸张的说，非常喜欢啊。虽然我对什么战争方面啊，什么乱七八糟的不是很了解，但是我就感觉很牛逼，非常合理，兄弟。就是真的太少了，希望多更一点，不知不觉就从第6章到第十几章，然后直接六十几章看完了，真的nice[码住][码住][码住][码住]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759203723,"group_id":"7539186050049002558","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"喵喵喵，永远屈服于温柔","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+Ix0+iQuBwqXRs5XqavwtPJVrVHWfdJNipLz+PYMYYH","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/4087a8a182104a639d21213dcac519a3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776535419&x-signature=Y9l3wxwEvtV3B6vsuTrxICEyUfw%3D","user_id":"1750843172332523","user_name":"你眼中的星辰呀"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1750843172332523","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539186050049002558","book_info":{"abstract":"（战场+日常+慢热+9--18章可跳、135章开始出现短视频）
穿梭日常和战场，两种割裂的人生，这是一个普通人成为癫子，后得到救赎，最后走向了自我的艰苦道路。
……
战场上：
经历了无数次的险死求生，精神理智，反复崩溃重塑。
经历了索姆河、黑鹰坠落、斯大林格勒等等战役。
最终，走向星空，面见帝皇，成为群星的使徒。
……
日常中（救赎后）：
“黑衣组织到底是什么？#黑衣组织#侦探#工藤新一……”
“真的有让人缩小的药吗？！#贝尔摩德#工藤新一#灰原哀……”
“打工皇帝安室透！！！……”
……
“《书记舞》藤原千花的背景揭示……#藤原千花#四宫辉夜”
“逗乐短视频出来后，有哪些秘密被公布出来。”
“金毛败犬有哪些……”
“铃木财团与四宫财团那个更有钱……”
……
“音乐少女们都有哪些杰作……”
“雪之下家族的姐妹花……”
“吉他英雄官宣……”
……
‘对呀，谁知道呢。’
‘反正我这边经常忙着恋爱和下下战场副本，空余时间当当小记者。’
随手发布标题为《黑衣组织有多少卧底？你以为是酒厂里掺了水，其实是水厂里掺了酒。》视频的乐正阳，对此表示不关我的事。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2of7447c2f9d53362f9b9050ed81d5384b~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"云行未晚","author_id":"","book_id":"7539186050049002558","book_name":"明明综漫日常，为什么是战场？！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#484848","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7542765064764260926","read_count":"16368","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1104400"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"6.4","serial_count":"454","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,综漫,同人,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ai/1138e3407c1e559f04cc510c9e6e707a~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779184664&x-signature=73hXOe77Vo6dzsRIiBF8qrpZUYE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3273701534468039","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201757441F25724BF4D0C8B0080D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text :"阅读不足30分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":19,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":597,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":1799,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":30118},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_reply_time":1758363941,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7557403221199930137","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"先给个四分观望一下，剧情很有意思，人物出现有些紧凑，作者不能很好的将想表达的故事精确的描绘出，所以前期经常能看到大片很突兀的表现。
人物塑造也是因为笔力不足，有些刻板而且用力过猛。前期一次性出现大量人物，人物多而且表现不是很好，对于不熟悉角色的人来说很容易陌生。希望作者能降低人物出现的速度或者用一段来描写角色在原作中的大致情况方便加深理解。
作者也说会在后续笔力进涨后回来重写，非常期待。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1759596184,"group_id":"7539186050049002558","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N2jJrV50fKNPa2QtXgo0sjkLaXV8cdR2qAQG5rJ7ux+8","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1790428706796477","user_name":"看的够快史就追不上我"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1790428706796477","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7539186050049002558","book_info":{"abstract":"（战场+日常+慢热+9--18章可跳、135章开始出现短视频）
